science.description: Neptune is the solar system's most distant planet, a cold, blue ice giant sitting nearly 30 times further from the sun than Earth. At that remote distance, temperatures plunge to nearly minus 200 degrees Celsius and a single year lasts 165 Earth years. Yet despite its isolation, Neptune is a world whipped by the fastest winds in the solar system and home to one of its most bizarre moons.

science.title: Saturn's chaotic atmosphere revealed in most comprehensive view yet by James Webb and Hubble telescopes
science.description: Viewing Saturn in complementary wavelengths, the James Webb and Hubble space telescopes reveal more about what makes up the layers of ringed planet's atmosphere.

ai.title: Trump allies launch new $100M pro-AI campaign to shape 2026 midterms

ai.title: Shekhar Kapur Unveils 'Masoom: The Next Generation' and Talks AI at IFFD 2026
ai.description: Shekhar Kapur announces 'Masoom: The Next Generation' during IFFD 2026, indicating a reunion of the original cast and addressing AI's growing role in film. He highlighted AI's capacity to democratize filmmaking but emphasized its limitations compared to human instinct and creativity. Kapur also expressed confidence in India's storytelling potential.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Shekhar Kapur Unveils 'Masoom: The Next Generation' and Talks AI at IFFD 2026
ai.description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.
